## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11

### 💡 Device Controls
- Adds APK-aligned Home Assistant controls for supported X-Sense light, alarm, reminder, comfort, calibration, sensitivity, and camera settings.
- Adds SBS50 light schedule and light group service actions using the same request paths as the X-Sense app.
- Keeps light power as a normal Home Assistant switch while setup and tuning controls remain configuration entities.

### 📷 Cameras
- Expands camera setup controls for supported admin accounts, including AI notification and AI assistant object switches.
- Keeps camera controls support-gated so unsupported or read-only accounts do not get writable entities.

### 🧹 Entity Cleanup
- Removes duplicate read-only sensor and binary sensor entities for values now exposed as writable Home Assistant controls.
- Adds obsolete-entity cleanup so existing installs shed stale duplicates after updating.
- Adds the missing Wi-Fi RSSI translation entry.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for APK light schedule and light group payloads, entity cleanup, service helpers, camera settings, and Home Assistant entity modeling.
